Interrupt request handler definitions, firmware startup initialization, system clock configuration, and build configuration for STM32 in Pebble firmware.


## Files
- **[irq_stm32f7.def](irq_stm32f7.def.md)**: Definitions for interrupt request handlers for various peripherals and events on STM32F7.
- **[startup_stm32.c](startup_stm32.c.md)**: Initializes firmware startup for STM32, including vector table setup and memory section initialization.
- **[system_stm32f4xx.c](system_stm32f4xx.c.md)**: Configures the system clock for STM32F4xx devices, including PLL settings and core clock updates.
- **[wscript_build](wscript_build.md)**: Configures source files for different platform builds in the Pebble firmware startup process.
